title: coleus recurvata
intro: Coleus recurvata, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions and known for its distinctive leaves and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Coleus recurvata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Coleus recurvata can be made into teas, infusions, or oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
